testcases.description: Verify if user able to launch the URL
testcases.raw: TC_01 Step Metadata editUI and FunctionalityVerify if user able to launch the URL Launch the Studio URL "https://qapartnerportal. kitaboo.com/reader/CL-ELA-master/#/login"Studio Listing page should display

testcases.description: Verify if user ia able to create math activity
testcases.expected: Create activity by entering basic info Activity creation page should display with Basic info screen
testcases.raw: TC_02 Step Metadata edit FunctionalityVerify if user ia able to create math activity 1. Launch the URL and Login with valid credentials 2.Click on "create new" 3.Click on math 4. Create activity by entering basic info Activity creation page should display with Basic info screen

Create activity by entering basic info 5. Click on start authoringShould redirect to New Activity creation page

testcases.description: Verify editing metadata of a step via “Edit Metadata” button in step menu
testcases.expected: Click Save Metadata updates and reflects in step header and activity list
testcases.raw: TC_10 Step Metadata editPositive Verify editing metadata of a step via “Edit Metadata” button in step menu 1. Click Step Menu (three dots) → Edit Metadata 2. Update Title, Description, Tags fields 3. Click Save Metadata updates and reflects in step header and activity list

testcases.description: Verify validation when required metadata field is blank1. Click Edit Metadata
testcases.expected: Click Save Validation error: “Title is required” displayed in red below field
testcases.raw: TC_11 Step Metadata editNegativeVerify validation when required metadata field is blank1. Click Edit Metadata 2. Clear Title 3. Click Save Validation error: “Title is required” displayed in red below field

testcases.description: Verify publishing activity using Publish button
testcases.expected: Confirm in Publish Confirmation Modal Activity status changes to “Published” and visible in Reader
testcases.raw: TC_12 Step Metadata editPositiveVerify publishing activity using Publish button 1. Click Publish in top-right 2. Confirm in Publish Confirmation Modal Activity status changes to “Published” and visible in Reader
